events.description: Founded in 1996 as the West Coast’s first ensemble dedicated to the full spectrum of Cuban dance music — from danzón to timba — Orquesta La Moderna Tradición is a 12-piece charanga orchestra featuring strings, woodwinds, piano, bass, percussion, and vocals. events.title: Alameda County Fair
events.description: The annual Alameda County Fair runs June 19-July 12, 2026, open Wednesday through Sunday. June 27 is an open Saturday. Family attractions include carnival rides, the Big O Tires Summer Concert Series, action sports shows, All Alaskan Racing Pigs, a nightly drone show and fireworks. The fairgrounds is also a designated Bay Area Host Committee World Cup fan-zone host site.
